task_description: Implement core audio processing logic and output handling in the Lambda function following strict TDD. Move from skeleton/placeholder to functional implementation that downloads input from S3, processes/generates audio via Polly, uploads output to S3, and updates DynamoDB metadata. Update CDK stack for proper IAM permissions and update ARCHITECTURE.md.

verification.summary: All 109 tests pass (84 CDK + 25 Lambda unit tests). cdk synth succeeds. tsc --noEmit clean. Lambda tests exercise real code paths with comprehensive mocking of AWS SDK clients. Semantic review v2: APPROVED.
